## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

```text
Problem fixed:
Files changed:
Reader benefit:
Tradeoffs:
```

## Type of Change

- [ ] Typo/grammar cleanup
- [ ] Explanation improvement
- [ ] Chapter structure/order change
- [ ] New or revised example
- [ ] Project spec improvement
- [ ] Evaluation/failure-mode improvement
- [ ] Security/governance/product-reality improvement
- [ ] Repo maintenance

## Quality Checklist

- [ ] Change preserves the dependency order of the course.
- [ ] Change teaches durable AI engineering judgment, not tool hype.
- [ ] New concepts include practical failure modes or tradeoffs.
- [ ] New project work includes concrete user, architecture, data model, and evaluation.
- [ ] Links were checked if files were moved or renamed.
- [ ] No private company context, secrets, customer data, or proprietary material is included.

## Brand and License Checklist

- [ ] I have the right to submit this contribution.
- [ ] This contribution may be included under Apache License 2.0.
- [ ] I did not copy restricted content from books, courses, docs, blogs, or private material.
- [ ] I did not use Quainy branding in a way that implies endorsement, partnership, or official status.
- [ ] If this includes AI-assisted text, I reviewed it for accuracy, originality, and license compatibility.

## Screenshots or Examples

If useful, add before/after snippets, diagrams, or examples.

## Notes for Maintainers

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to?
